name: Becoming the Wife of a Dark Cult Overlord
overview: This is not love but obsession! Kidnapped as a female saint, Hee-jin finds out that her boyfriend Yo-han was actually a dark cult overlord, and plans an escape with him. Hee-jin meets a mysterious man Isaac who provides her a significant information about Yo-han. Can Hee-jin trust Yo-han? Will they be able to escape safely and reach a happy ending?

trailers.title: 숏드라마 〈사이비 교주의 아내가 되었습니다〉 메인 예고편 | 숏챠 오리지널
